name: Barrage Blast
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>掃</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>射</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>特</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>攻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Once per turn, you can detach any number of materials from Machine Xyz Monsters you control, then target that many cards on the field; destroy them. If a Machine Xyz Monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect while this card is in your GY: You can banish this card and 1 Machine Xyz Monster from your GY; inflict damage to your opponent equal to the banished monster's Rank x 200.
eff: Once per turn, you can detach any number of materials from Machine Xyz Monsters you control, then target that many cards on the field; destroy them. If a Machine Xyz Monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect while this card is in your GY: You can banish this card and 1 Machine Xyz Monster from your GY; inflict damage to your opponent equal to the banished monster's Rank x 200.

sets.set: Legendary Duelists: Sisters of the Rose

action: Detaches multiple Xyz Materials as cost
Activates if destroyed by card effect
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
